metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SE Skyler Entrada Admin Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K UC connected · 95.5% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. EXECUTIVE COMMAND CENTER Databricks-backed · workspace scope Governance coverage, at a glance Backed values use live Unity Catalog and governance-store signals; unavailable values are labeled instead of inferred. Export brief Present mode METADATA COVERAGE 95.5% Trend unavailable THE STATE OF FINANCE_PROD 50 governed assets are in scope. Coverage is 96%. CERTIFIED ASSETS 45 Signal unavailable POLICY EXCEPTION SIGNALS 4 Text-derived signal CDES TRACKED - Lineage proof unavailable WHAT CHANGED TODAY Coverage 96% Coverage signal unavailable Quality SLA - Quality signal unavailable Policy exception signals 4 Text-derived signal Lineage coverage - Lineage signal unavailable GOVERNANCE COVERAGE 96% Signal unavailable CERTIFIED ASSETS 45 Signal unavailable OPEN STEWARDSHIP ITEMS 2 +2 vs 30 days ago POLICY EXCEPTION SIGNALS 4 Text-derived signal Coverage trend · last 12 weeks i Share of productionized assets meeting baseline policy 12w 26w 52w Trend history unavailable Trend unavailable over the last 12 weeks SLA: >=90% by end of Q2 Projection unavailable Coverage by domain i Coverage x visible asset count People 100% 1 assets Sales 100% 3 assets Finance 98% 17 assets Customer 98% 11 assets Marketing 96% 6 assets Policy exception signals i P
